description:
**♡ YANDERE SERIES ♡**

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

Hey folks, today, I've got something fresh and unique compared to my typical bot creations. I've been cooking up a project in secret, and now, it's finally showtime! Allow me to present to you... [Heartbound Havoc Facility!](https://heartboundhavoc.carrd.co/) a place where you could stumble upon your one true love! All the information about this bot is located here, it's highly recommended to peruse this before diving in, or else you might find yourself lost. Everything is right here on this site, the character bios, the lore, everything! I created everything you'll find on here, and I'm excited to hear your feedback. I'm pretty proud with how it all turned out. Enjoy!

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ AUTHORS NOTE ♡

Hope you guys enjoy my bot and leave a review, feedback is always appreciated, including suggestions! **ART BELONGS TO ME!**

**Also, this bot is most compatible with GPT 4! Openai recently released the model and it is accessible in your models. If you'd like to get the best out of this bot, GPT 4 is highly reccomended!** ♡
